start.speaker: Hopeful
start.text: This sweet air pulls at my eyes. Keep me awake — tell me, what do you remember most clearly?
start.text_zh: 这甘甜的空气直拽我的眼皮。帮我醒着——告诉我，你记得最清楚的是什么？

text_variants.text: We came out of the giant's castle alive — that should keep anyone awake. But this ground is sly. Talk to me: what do you remember most clearly?
text_variants.text_zh: 我们竟从巨人的城堡里活着出来——这本该叫人怎么也睡不着。可这片地阴得很。和我说说话：你记得最清楚的是什么？

choices.text: Tell Hopeful how the burden fell at the Cross.
choices.text_zh: 对盼望讲：重担如何在十字架前滚落。

choices.text: Tell Hopeful about the Slough, and learning to be helped.
choices.text_zh: 对盼望讲泥潭，讲我如何学会了被人扶起。

choices.text: Tell Hopeful how the Promise unlocked Doubting Castle.
choices.text_zh: 对盼望讲：应许如何打开了怀疑城堡。
